message:
🐛 Fix AddCard modal stacking with KeepAlive navigation (#2050)

KeepAlive preserves previously-visited dashboard components in the DOM
with display:none. When navigating to /?addCard=true (from search),
useSearchParams fires in ALL cached components simultaneously, causing
each to open its own AddCardModal — resulting in 2-4 stacked modals.

Fix: Guard each component's addCard useEffect with a location.pathname
check so only the active route processes the URL parameter. For the
generic DashboardPage component, capture the mount-time pathname via
useRef since it doesn't know its own route.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
